attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION_KEY, 
RECORD_TYPE_CD, 
MISSING_PRODUCT_FLG, 
MISSING_SHIP_TO_HTS_FLG, 
MSNG_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_HTS_FLG, 
IMPORTED_ITEM_FLG, 
SOURCE_CREATION_DTM, 
IGNORE_ORDER_FLG, 
SALES_ORDER_GROUP_CD, 
ITEM_CLASSIFIED_FLG, 
REASON_CMNT, 
REMOVED_DT, 
BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT, 
BK_SRC_LOC_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
BK_SHIP_TO_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
BK_SRCLOC_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
BK_SHP_TO_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD, 
BK_SRC_LOC_OVERRIDE_WRLD_CG_CD, 
BK_OCC_INTERFACE_ISO_CNTRY_CD, 
BK_OCC_INTERFACE_OVRDE_CG_CD, 
SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT, 
SS_CD, 
RU_SHIPMENT_DT, 
RU_LAST_UPDATED_DT, 
RU_SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DT, 
RU_ORDER_STATUS_CD, 
RU_ROUTE_CD, 
RU_IMPORT_STATUS_FLG, 
RU_ORDER_HOLD_FLG, 
RU_IMPORTER_OF_RECORD_NAME, 
RU_MISSING_SHIP_FROM_HTS_FLG, 
RU_CG1_BUSINESS_GROUP_CD, 
RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_WRLD_CG_CD, 
RU_BK_SHPFRM_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
RU_BK_SHIP_FROM_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
RU_BK_INTRFC_OVRDE_ISOCNTRY_CD, 
PRODUCT_KEY, 
CG1_TYPE, 
RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
RU_SRC_RPTD_SO_NUM, 
EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
EDW_CREATE_USER, 
EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
MISSING_OCC_CG_HTS_FLG, 
RU_SRC_RPTD_SHIPSET_NUM_INT 
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION WCIE
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUBE_ITEM_EXCEPTION NCIE
 WHERE NCIE.SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT = WCIE.SK_NOTIFY_SEQ_INT
 AND NCIE.SS_CD = WCIE.SS_CD)
